name: FLUX.2 [pro] Preview
description: FLUX.2 [pro] Preview is Black Forest Labs' recommended default for production image generation and editing — tracks the latest [pro] weights with strong multi-reference support.

examples.name: Simple Prompt
examples.description: Standard text-to-image generation with the recommended FLUX.2 [pro] preview endpoint

input.prompt: A serene mountain landscape at golden hour, soft diffused light filtering through clouds

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl

examples.name: Multi-Reference Editing
examples.description: Multi-reference editing — combine two reference images in a single composition

input.prompt: Combine the subjects of these images into a single editorial fashion scene

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl

examples.name: Reproducible PNG Output
examples.description: Seeded generation with PNG output for downstream editing pipelines

input.prompt: A pastel watercolor of a koi pond at sunrise

code_snippets.label: typescript

prompt.description: Text prompt for image generation or editing.

width.description: Width of the generated image in pixels (minimum 64). Omit to let BFL pick.

height.description: Height of the generated image in pixels (minimum 64). Omit to let BFL pick.

safety_tolerance.description: Tolerance for input/output moderation. 0 is the strictest, 5 the most permissive. Defaults to 2.

output_format.description: Output image format. Defaults to jpeg.

input_images.description: Up to 8 reference images for editing or multi-image composition. Each entry is an HTTPS URL or a data:image/...;base64,... URI.
